survey.title: Sondage Multilingue: Expérience à Faro et Habitudes d'Apprentissage
survey.subtitle: Multi-Language Survey: Faro Experience and Learning Habits

language_selection.question: Choisissez votre langue préférée pour répondre au sondage: / Please choose your preferred language for the survey: / Por favor, escolha o seu idioma preferido para o inquérito: / Elija su idioma preferido para la encuesta:

questions.q2: On a scale of 0 (Very Poor) to 10 (Excellent), how would you rate your overall appreciation of the city of Faro?
questions.q3: What do you consider to be the single biggest flaw of Faro? (Select all that apply)
questions.q4: If you selected 'Other' above, please specify the biggest flaw:
questions.q5: Do you have any suggestions to improve the city of Faro? (Optional)
questions.q6: Which are the operating system of your smartphone?
questions.q7: How would you rate your overall satisfaction with your mobile operating system?
questions.q8: If you use Duolingo, how would you rate your overall appreciation of the application?
questions.q9: What do you consider Duolingo's biggest flaw?

q9_options.ads: Too many ads (if using the free version)
q9_options.inaccurate: The translation system is sometimes inaccurate

questions.q10: Would you be willing to pay €3 a month for a language learning app that meets your needs?

labels.already_responded_msg: Thank you for your interest, but only one response per user is allowed.
labels.success_msg: We appreciate your time and valuable feedback. Your response has been safely recorded.
